[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''James Ortell Donovan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Mindabaal]] who was the father of [[Jericho Donovan|Jericho]] and [[Josephine Donovan]] and the original owner of ''[[Jericho's Pride]]''. Donovan sent Jericho to the [[Mindabaal Royal Academy]] in an effort to instill some discipline into her. Upon her graduation, she stole the ''Royal Flower'', renaming it the ''Jericho's Pride'' and embarking on a career of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]].<ref name="SOR" />

Donovan was his homeworld's representative to the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] and it was widely understood that his daughter Josephine would succeed him in the position. She was a graduate of the [[Mindabaal Diplomatic Corps]] and an [[Imperial Liaison]]. However, Josephine was kidnapped by Jericho after a pirate attack staged on the Donovan family's [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]]. After the [[Bombardment of Mindabaal|bombardment]] of the Mindabaal by the Empire, Jericho and Josphine held out hope that their father survived the assault.<ref name="SOR" />
